description: Air Vice-Marshal Mark Hunt was appointed Deputy Director General and Technical Director for the Defence Safety Authority on 18 December 2024. His previous Ministry of Defence roles include: Defence Equipment and Support Team Leader, Type Airworthiness Authority, Portfolio Head and Principal Engineer Director of Ground Training (delivering the RAF’s education policy, governance and assurance for all 27 specialist disciplines) Deputy Air Officer commanding No 22 Group Commandant of the Defence School of Aeronautical Engineering RAF Cosford’s Station Commander, Head of Establishment and Accountable Manager Chief Air Engineer at RAF Brize Norton

details.body:
Air Vice-Marshal Mark Hunt was appointed Deputy Director General and Technical Director for the Defence Safety Authority on 18 December 2024.

His previous Ministry of Defence roles include:

  • Defence Equipment and Support Team Leader, Type Airworthiness Authority, Portfolio Head and Principal Engineer
  • Director of Ground Training (delivering the RAF’s education policy, governance and assurance for all 27 specialist disciplines)
  • Deputy Air Officer commanding No 22 Group
  • Commandant of the Defence School of Aeronautical Engineering
  • RAF Cosford’s Station Commander, Head of Establishment and Accountable Manager
  • Chief Air Engineer at RAF Brize Norton
details.full_name: Air Vice-Marshal Mark Hunt OBE BEng(Hons) MSc MA MBA FCMI CEng FRAeS FIMechE RAF

details.body:
Air Vice-Marshal Mark Hunt was appointed Deputy Director General and Technical Director for the Defence Safety Authority on 18 December 2024.

His previous Ministry of Defence roles include:

  • Defence Equipment and Support Team Leader, Type Airworthiness Authority, Portfolio Head and Principal Engineer
  • Director of Ground Training (delivering the RAF’s education policy, governance and assurance for all 27 specialist disciplines)
  • Deputy Air Officer commanding No 22 Group
  • Commandant of the Defence School of Aeronautical Engineering
  • RAF Cosford’s Station Commander, Head of Establishment and Accountable Manager
  • Chief Air Engineer at RAF Brize Norton

image.alt_text: Air Vice-Marshal Mark Hunt OBE BEng(Hons) MSc MA MBA FCMI CEng FRAeS FIMechE RAF

person.title: Air Vice-Marshal Mark Hunt OBE BEng(Hons) MSc MA MBA FCMI CEng FRAeS FIMechE RAF

details.body:
Responsibilities include:

  • As Deputy Director General, lead DSA’s strategy development and governance, representing the Director General as interlocutor across Defence for independent safety and environmental regulation, assurance, enforcement and investigation.
  • As Technical Director, cohere the Defence Regulators across Aviation, Maritime, Land, Nuclear, Ordnance, Munitions and Explosives, Medical Services, Fire and Environmental Protection.

role.title: Deputy Director General and Technical Director of the DSA
